title: Run Phase 2 bench suspended and ground tests
description: Validate motion gradually from one leg through suspended full robot to low-speed ground tests.
acceptance_criteria: One-leg test, suspended full-body test, low-speed ground gait test, fault injection, and telemetry log review are documented.

title: Complete firmware safety state machine
description: Complete safe state transitions for boot, arm, walk, maintenance, faults, and estop.
acceptance_criteria: Boot, disarmed, arming checks, stand ready, RC manual, Jetson assisted, Mac maintenance, soft fault, hard fault, and estop transitions are tested.

title: Implement rate-limited telemetry subscriptions
description: Allow host clients to subscribe to telemetry streams at safe rates.
acceptance_criteria: Host can subscribe and unsubscribe streams; stream rates are enforced; dropped frames and backlog counters are visible.

title: Implement RC Jetson Mac command arbitration
description: Implement command-source priority and heartbeat-based authority management.
acceptance_criteria: RC kill overrides all; Jetson requires fresh heartbeat and RC-enabled autonomy; Mac maintenance lock expires safely.

title: Implement DXL Sync Write and status telemetry
description: Update all servo goals efficiently and read status for telemetry and safety.
acceptance_criteria: All servo goals update in one control cycle; status read includes position, velocity, load or PWM, voltage, temperature, and error bits.

title: Implement gait engine v1
description: Generate bounded foot targets for initial gait modes.
acceptance_criteria: Stand, sit, tripod, ripple, and crawl or wave produce bounded foot targets at 50 Hz.

title: Implement 3-DOF leg IK and body pose transform
description: Implement deterministic leg inverse kinematics and body transforms for the hexapod.
acceptance_criteria: IK returns joint angles and reachability; tests cover nominal, edge, and unreachable foot targets.

title: Implement servo map and joint limit enforcement
description: Convert logical leg and joint targets into DXL ticks using the validated config.
acceptance_criteria: Leg/joint target converts to DXL ticks; sign, zero, min, and max are applied; clamp flags are reported.

title: Implement config API over USB protocol
description: Expose config get, set, validate, commit, and reset through the host protocol.
acceptance_criteria: RAM shadow and EEPROM transaction are used; invalid configs are rejected with errors.

title: Define persistent robot config schema
description: Define the EEPROM-backed schema for robot geometry, servo map, sensor calibration, and gait defaults.
acceptance_criteria: Schema includes servo ID mapping, leg geometry, servo signs/offsets/min/max, gait defaults, sensor calibration, and config version.

title: Phase 2 - Firmware motion, sensors, config API, and telemetry
description: Make the robot controller useful without the companion app: safe walking, servo mapping, IK/gait control, sensor polling, config updates, telemetry, and command arbitration.

title: Implement CRSF parser and RC failsafe status
description: Parse ExpressLRS CRSF channel frames and expose RC/failsafe status.
acceptance_criteria: Channels normalize to stable units; stale RC triggers failsafe flag; arming, kill, and gait channels are mapped.
close_reason: CRSF parser + RC failsafe (rbg.9). Added portable src/input/crsf_parser.{h,cpp} (no Arduino deps, native-testable): CRSF DVB-S2 CRC8 (poly 0xD5); byte-wise streaming Parser state machine (sync 0xC8 / length / data) validating framing+CRC and unpacking the 16x11-bit RC_CHANNELS_PACKED (type 0x16) payload; ticksToMicros normalization (172..1811 -> ~988..2012us). RcStatus mapping normalizes channels to microseconds and maps AETR + AUX layout: arm(CH5)/kill(CH6)/3-pos gait(CH7); evaluateFailsafe raises failsafe when no valid frame within 250ms and forces disarm+kill; initRcStatus boots to safe failsafe state. Wired into tasks.cpp rcTask: file-static crsf::Parser g_crsfParser + crsf::RcStatus g_rcStatus, Serial2 @420000 baud (guarded by PIN_SERIAL2_RX so mkrzero still builds), drains bytes -> applyFrame, evaluateFailsafe every loop; rcTask owns Serial2 exclusively. Native build_src_filter includes input/crsf_parser.cpp; added test/test_crsf (8 cases: crc8 KAT 0xD3, ticks->us bounds, full-frame decode roundtrip, resync-after-garbage, bad-CRC reject, arm/kill/gait mapping, stale failsafe, safe init). Validation: native 36/36; openrb150 builds RAM 61.0% / Flash 9.3%.

title: Implement 24LC32 page driver and transactional config store
description: Implement EEPROM page IO and two-slot CRC-protected config transactions.
acceptance_criteria: Config load, validate, commit, power-cycle recovery, corrupt-slot rejection, and defaults fallback are tested.
close_reason: 24LC32 driver + transactional config store (rbg.8). Added portable src/config/config_store.{h,cpp} (no Arduino deps, native-testable) with a ConfigBackend abstraction: two redundant slots (slot0@0, slot1@2048 in the 4KB device), 16-byte header (magic 'HEXC', version, sequence, length, payload_crc, header_crc) using protocol CRC-16/CCITT-FALSE. load() returns newest valid slot (highest sequence); commit() always writes the INACTIVE slot with sequence+1, payload first then header last, so a crash mid-commit never corrupts the active slot (power-cycle safe). Validation rejects bad magic/version/oversize-length, bad header_crc, and bad payload_crc; inspect() reports per-slot validity. Added Arduino-only src/config/eeprom_24lc32.{h,cpp}: Eeprom24LC32 implements ConfigBackend over Wire @0x50, read auto-chunked to 32B, write split on 32-byte page boundaries with ACK-poll write-completion (no fixed delay), 4KB bounds-checked. Wired into tasks.cpp i2cTask: file-static g_eeprom(Wire)+g_configStore+g_configVolatile; at boot, if EEPROM present, inspect slots and set g_configVolatile = no valid slot (defaults-fallback hook; full payload schema lands in Phase 2). Native build_src_filter includes config/config_store.cpp; added test/test_config_store (9 cases: blank->load fails, commit/load roundtrip, A/B slot alternation + newest wins, corrupt-newest falls back to older, corrupt-header rejected, power-loss-during-commit keeps previous (fault-injected fake), oversize rejected, header serialize roundtrip, empty payload). Validation: native 51/51; openrb150 builds RAM 63.0% / Flash 10.6%.

title: Implement DYNAMIXEL bus manager maintenance scan
description: Create the single-owner DXL bus manager and maintenance-safe scan/ping path.
acceptance_criteria: Scan, ping, and status work with torque off; bus errors are counted; no other task touches DXL directly.
close_reason: Single-owner DXL bus manager (rbg.6). Added src/dxl: portable dxl_model.{h,cpp} (ServoProfile, TableKind, model->table classification: MX-28 legacy=29 Protocol 1.0 CW/CCW angle limits, MX-28(2.0)=30 Protocol 2.0 min/max position limits + sync/fast-sync/profile-velocity/bus-watchdog capability flags) and Arduino-only dxl_bus.{h,cpp} (DxlBus owns Serial1 via Dynamixel2Arduino; maintenance-safe ping w/ protocol 2.0->1.0 fallback, range scan, torque-off readStatus for position/velocity/voltage/temperature/hw-error; BusStats counters scans/pings/reads/last_error; NEVER enables torque or DXL power). Wired one file-static dxl::DxlBus g_dxlBus(Serial1) into tasks.cpp dxlTask (begin() once at boot, no auto-scan since scan needs power on -> deferred to Phase 2 maintenance API); no other task touches Serial1/DXL. Native build_src_filter now includes dxl/dxl_model.cpp; added test/test_dxl_model (6 cases). Validation: native 28/28 (6 dxl_model + 10 api + 12 protocol); openrb150 builds RAM 60.6% / Flash 9.1%.

title: Implement USB API v0
description: Expose the first USB CDC API commands needed by host tools.
acceptance_criteria: HELLO, HEARTBEAT, GET_STATUS, and GET_CAPABILITIES work over USB CDC.
close_reason: USB API v0 implemented over USB CDC: HELLO, HEARTBEAT, GET_STATUS, GET_CAPABILITIES (msg IDs 0x01-0x04) plus a generic unknown-msg error response. Added protocol/api.{h,cpp} (handleRequest dispatch, DeviceInfo/StatusSnapshot inputs, versioned response payloads) and protocol/frame_reader.{h,cpp} (streaming COBS frame reassembly with auto-reset and back-to-back delimiter sharing). apiTask now owns USB CDC exclusively (removed health task Serial prints), drains Serial bytes through FrameReader, builds a live StatusSnapshot (uptime/state/dxl_power/dxl_power_control/battery_mv/watchdog_missed) and replies. Mirrored host module protocol/python/hexapod_protocol/api.py with build_command/parse_* helpers. Shared golden vectors regenerated in frames.json. Tests: native Unity 22/22 (12 protocol + 10 api/frame_reader), Python pytest 43/43, both cross-validated against the same golden bytes. openrb150 builds RAM 58.3% / Flash 8.8%.

title: Implement protocol framing golden vectors
description: Implement COBS plus CRC16 framing and shared protocol test vectors.
acceptance_criteria: COBS plus CRC16 encode/decode works in firmware and host tests; corrupt frames are rejected.
close_reason: COBS + CRC16 framing implemented and tested on both sides. Firmware: src/protocol/{crc16,cobs,framing}.{h,cpp} (portable, heap-free, caller-owned buffers; 14-byte LE header per AGENTS.md 6.1, CRC-16/CCITT-FALSE). Host: protocol/python/hexapod_protocol. Shared golden vectors in protocol/tests/vectors/frames.json (generated by gen_vectors.py). Native Unity tests (pio test -e native) 12/12 pass; Python pytest 34/34 pass; both assert identical golden bytes and reject corrupt frames (bit flip, bad magic, truncation, malformed COBS). Added [env:native] + [fw_base] refactor to platformio.ini. protocol/README.md documents format + test commands.

title: Bring up FreeRTOS task skeleton
description: Start the firmware RTOS tasks with bounded stacks and visible health reporting.
acceptance_criteria: Control, DXL, API, I2C, RC, and health tasks start; stack high-water marks are visible; watchdog stub exists.
close_reason: FreeRTOS task skeleton up (briscoetech/FreeRTOS_SAMD21). Six bounded-stack tasks created in src/app/tasks.cpp (control/dxl/rc/api/i2c/health) with priorities+periods in src/app/task_config.h. Health task blinks USER LED and reports uptime, per-task stack high-water marks, loop counts, and watchdog mask over USB CDC. Software watchdog stub in src/safety/watchdog.{h,cpp} (HW WDT pet TODO). Task stacks allocated boot-only; no runtime heap churn. Both envs build (openrb150 RAM 56.5%/Flash 8.4%). Runtime [health] observation folded into HIL smoke tests rbg.10.

title: Implement board HAL and safe boot defaults
description: Centralize board pins and safe boot behavior.
acceptance_criteria: DXL power remains off at boot; board pins/constants are centralized; battery ADC and status hooks exist.
close_reason: Board HAL added: src/board/openrb150_pins.h centralizes pins; src/board/board.{h,cpp} forces DXL power FET OFF at boot, exposes setDxlPower/setUserLed status hooks and battery ADC (readBatteryMilliVolts, provisional 4.0x divider flagged for HIL calibration in rbg.10). main.cpp routed through HAL. Both envs build clean (openrb150 RAM 10.9%/Flash 5.6%).

title: Create monorepo skeleton and firmware build target
description: Create the monorepo layout and make the OpenRB-150 firmware build from the command line.
acceptance_criteria: Repo layout exists; firmware compiles for OpenRB-150; README contains flash command; local check command is documented.
close_reason: Custom OpenRB-150 PlatformIO board (boards/openrb150.json) + exact variant (variants/OpenRB-150) created; firmware builds via 'pio run' and was flashed to hardware. README documents flash + local check commands.

title: Phase 1 - Firmware foundation and safe I/O
description: Boot OpenRB-150 firmware safely, establish bus ownership, prove DXL/I2C/RC/API basics, and create a validated configuration store.

title: Implement calibration workflows
description: Create guided calibration for servo geometry and sensor baselines.
acceptance_criteria: Servo zero, sign, min/max, leg geometry, and sensor baselines can be calibrated, validated, saved, and exported.

title: Build Diagnostics page
description: Create developer diagnostics for raw frames, protocol, DXL, I2C, and firmware timing.
acceptance_criteria: Raw frame inspector, protocol stats, DXL errors, I2C errors, and firmware timing counters are visible.

title: Build Servo Config page
description: Create EEPROM-backed servo map and config editor UI.
acceptance_criteria: User can view, edit, validate, diff, commit, export, and import servo map/config.

title: Build Leg Lab page
description: Create individual leg and joint maintenance controls.
acceptance_criteria: Individual leg, foot, and joint controls work only in maintenance mode and show IK and clamp feedback.

title: Build Gait Lab page
description: Create safe controls for gait selection and body movement.
acceptance_criteria: Gait selection and safe body twist controls work with visible arming and mode requirements.

title: Build Connect and Overview pages
description: Create connection and status pages for daily development.
acceptance_criteria: User can connect, see firmware capabilities, robot state, battery, DXL/I2C health, and active command source.

title: Build PySide6 application shell
description: Build a native-style application shell with navigation and global safety affordances.
acceptance_criteria: App launches on macOS with navigation, global status bar, and global estop widget.

title: Phase 4 - Companion UI foundation and core pages
description: Build the first usable macOS development UI with clear navigation and safe controls.

title: Implement companion CLI tools
description: Add CLI commands for status, streaming, logging, replay, and config transfer.
acceptance_criteria: status, stream, log, replay, config dump, and config restore commands work.

title: Implement session logger
description: Record raw frames, decoded telemetry, events, and config snapshots.
acceptance_criteria: Logger writes a complete session directory with raw frames, decoded telemetry, events, and config snapshot.

title: Implement typed protocol client
description: Expose high-level Python methods for the robot serial API.
acceptance_criteria: Supports hello, status, capabilities, subscribe, config get, and safe error handling.

title: Implement serial connection service
description: Create non-blocking USB serial connection lifecycle management.
acceptance_criteria: Discovers USB serial ports, connects, reconnects, heartbeats, and reports link state without blocking.

title: Implement Python protocol codec
description: Implement COBS, CRC, framing, and schema-version handling in Python.
acceptance_criteria: Codec matches firmware golden vectors; corrupt frames are rejected; schema version detection works.

title: Create Python companion package scaffold
description: Set up the companion Python package and command entry point.
acceptance_criteria: Package installs locally; lint and test commands are documented; CLI entry point exists.

title: Phase 3 - Companion transport, protocol client, and data logger
description: Create a scriptable Python package that connects to the robot, decodes telemetry, sends safe commands, and records sessions before building the full UI.

title: Implement Robotic Finger Sensor v2 polling
description: Poll all six muxed finger sensors without blocking control.
acceptance_criteria: All six mux channels produce pressure, proximity, and contact telemetry at configured rate; I2C errors do not block control.

title: Create Phase 1 hardware-in-loop smoke tests
description: Document and script the initial hardware smoke checks.
acceptance_criteria: Checklist covers boot, USB, DXL, I2C, EEPROM, CRSF, and fault observations.
close_reason: Phase 1 HIL smoke tests (rbg.10). Added tools/hil_smoke.py: automated USB-API smoke driver using the shared hexapod_protocol Python package + pyserial. Auto-detects/opens the USB CDC port, runs HELLO (verifies protocol v0.1 + device identity 'OpenRB150-Hex'), GET_STATUS (asserts boot-safety invariants: DXL power OFF at boot, watchdog_missed==0, telemetry decodes), HEARTBEAT x2 (asserts uptime advances = scheduler running), GET_CAPABILITIES (feature bitmap decodes); per-check PASS/FAIL, exit 0 all-pass / 1 fail / 2 setup-error; --list and --port options with single-port auto-detect. Verified offline: imports clean, --list enumerates ports, bad-port fails gracefully (no hardware needed). Added docs/hil_smoke_phase1.md: full checklist covering boot (USER LED blink, DXL LED red/power-off), USB handshake (scripted), DXL bench scan (model/protocol detect, torque-off read-only, error counters), I2C topology (mux 0x70/EEPROM 0x50/foot channels 0-5 Present/Fault/Missing, reserved 6-7, mux-removal degradation), EEPROM persistence (commit/power-cycle/reload, corrupt-slot fallback, volatile-defaults reject-commit), CRSF (channel normalize, arm/kill/gait map, TX-off failsafe within ~250ms), and fault observations (estop state transition, watchdog, runtime I2C removal degrades not freezes). Closes the Phase 1 epic gate. Validation: native 51/51 still green; script verified without hardware.

title: Implement TCA9548A and root I2C scan
description: Create I2C mux selection and scan tooling for root and mux channels.
acceptance_criteria: Root bus scan finds mux and EEPROM; channel scan finds sensor devices; mux channel selection is exclusive.
close_reason: TCA9548A + root I2C scan (rbg.7). Added portable src/sensors/i2c_topology.{h,cpp} (no Arduino deps, native-testable): address constants (mux 0x70, EEPROM 0x50, VCNL4040 0x60, LPS25HB 0x5C), I2cTopology/ChannelInfo model, FootSensorState classification (Present=both on-board devices, Fault=partial, Missing=neither), isExpectedRootAddress, updateChannelState, footSensorPresentMask/Count over foot channels 0..5 (reserved 6,7 excluded). Added Arduino-only src/sensors/i2c_bus.{h,cpp}: I2cBus owns Wire (arduino::TwoWire), begin(100kHz); probe via beginTransmission/endTransmission==0; selectChannel writes one-hot bitmask to TCA9548A (exclusive, exactly one channel live); selectNone; scanRoot detects mux+EEPROM; scanChannels selects each foot channel exclusively, probes VCNL4040/LPS25HB, classifies, always deselects after; scanAll = root then channels; I2cStats counters (root/channel scans, mux_select_errors, last_error). Wired into tasks.cpp i2cTask: file-static i2c::I2cBus g_i2cBus(Wire) + g_i2cTopology, begin()+scanAll() one-time boot discovery (blocking probes kept off control loop); i2cTask owns Wire exclusively. Native build_src_filter includes sensors/i2c_topology.cpp; added test/test_i2c_topology (6 cases: init clears, classify all 4 combos, expected root addr, updateChannelState, present mask+count, reserved-channel exclusion). Validation: native 42/42; openrb150 builds RAM 63.0% / Flash 10.2%.

title: Complete operator and developer documentation
description: Write user-facing and developer-facing project docs.
acceptance_criteria: Docs cover wiring, flashing, config, calibration, operation, troubleshooting, logging, plotting, and URDF use.

title: Add CI and quality gates
description: Add repeatable local and CI checks.
acceptance_criteria: Firmware unit tests, protocol vectors, Python tests, linting, and type checks run in CI where possible.

title: Implement Jetson Python bridge
description: Use the same protocol client on Jetson for high-level commands and telemetry.
acceptance_criteria: Jetson can send body twist/gait commands and receive telemetry using the same protocol client.

title: Phase 6 - Jetson bridge, integration, packaging, and release hardening
description: Integrate autonomy workflows and make the tools repeatable for daily use.

title: Build URDF Viewer page
description: Render the URDF and update it from live or replay joint telemetry.
acceptance_criteria: Model renders and updates from live or replay joint telemetry.

title: Create hexapod URDF package
description: Create a URDF model for body, legs, and actuated joints.
acceptance_criteria: URDF loads successfully and includes links and joints for body, six legs, and 18 actuated joints.

title: Add event markers and session notes
description: Record and visualize user and robot events in sessions.
acceptance_criteria: Gait changes, faults, config commits, and user notes appear on plots and in logs.

title: Build Plot Workbench page
description: Create live and replay plotting for robot telemetry.
acceptance_criteria: Live and replay plots can display selected fields from servo, leg, control, RC, and sensor streams.

title: Phase 5 - Plotting, session analysis, and URDF visualization
description: Turn the companion app into the main troubleshooting and calibration tool.

title: Add UI smoke tests and replay fixtures
description: Make UI pages testable without hardware by using replay fixtures.
acceptance_criteria: Pages construct in tests and can consume replay telemetry without hardware.

title: Build Sensor Dashboard page
description: Create live sensor panels for the muxed Robotic Finger Sensor v2 boards.
acceptance_criteria: All six sensor channels show live values, health, and calibration actions.

title: Implement replay system
description: Replay saved sessions into services and tests without hardware.
acceptance_criteria: Replay can feed decoded telemetry to tests and future UI from saved sessions.

title: Package companion app for local macOS install
description: Create a documented local install/package path for the Mac app.
acceptance_criteria: Documented install and run flow works from a clean Mac developer machine.

title: Implement Mac to Jetson proxy mode
description: Allow Mac companion access through Jetson when direct MCU USB is unavailable.
acceptance_criteria: Mac companion can monitor or control through Jetson when MCU USB is owned by Jetson.

title: Prototype optional ROS 2 bridge
description: Prototype ROS 2 integration on Jetson only.
acceptance_criteria: ROS 2 node maps high-level messages to serial API without changing MCU firmware.

title: Implement session export reporting
description: Export selected data and summaries from recorded sessions.
acceptance_criteria: Selected session data can export to CSV and a human-readable summary report.

value: DXL bus default protocol is 1.0 (MX-28AT factory/legacy table). DxlBus.ping tries 1.0 then 2.0; readStatus defaults to 1.0 when a servo's protocol is unknown.
